message.content:
@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor black
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelineStrategy solid
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #ADD8E6
skinparam participantBorderColor #ADD8E6
skinparam participantFontColor black
skinparam controlBackgroundColor #D3D3D3
skinparam controlBorderColor #D3D3D3
skinparam controlFontColor black
skinparam entityBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam entityBorderColor #FFFFE0
skinparam entityFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteBorderColor #FFFFE0
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam arrowColor white
skinparam activationBackgroundColor white
skinparam activationBorderColor white

actor "User" as User
participant "«boundary»\nZMDomačaStran" as ZMDomačaStran
control "«control»\nKrmilnikNovica" as KrmilnikNovica
control "«control»\nKrmilnikPredloga" as KrmilnikPredloga
control "«control»\nKrmilnikDogodek" as KrmilnikDogodek
entity "«entity»\nPredlogProjekta" as PredlogProjekta
entity "«entity»\nNovica" as Novica
participant "«boundary»\nSVGoogleCalendar\nAPI" as SVGoogleCalendarAPI

User -> ZMDomačaStran: Prikaz domače strani
activate ZMDomačaStran
ZMDomačaStran -> KrmilnikNovica: Pridobi novice
activate KrmilnikNovica
KrmilnikNovica -> KrmilnikPredloga: Pridobi predloge
activate KrmilnikPredloga
KrmilnikPredloga -> PredlogProjekta: Pridobi podatke
activate PredlogProjekta
PredlogProjekta --> KrmilnikPredloga: Vrne podatke
deactivate PredlogProjekta
KrmilnikPredloga --> KrmilnikNovica: Vrne predloge
deactivate KrmilnikPredloga
KrmilnikNovica -> Novica: Pridobi novice
activate Novica
Novica --> KrmilnikNovica: Vrne novice
deactivate Novica
KrmilnikNovica --> ZMDomačaStran: Vrne novice
deactivate KrmilnikNovica
ZMDomačaStran -> KrmilnikDogodek: Pridobi dogodke
activate KrmilnikDogodek
KrmilnikDogodek -> SVGoogleCalendarAPI: Pridobi dogodke
activate SVGoogleCalendarAPI
SVGoogleCalendarAPI --> KrmilnikDogodek: Vrne dogodke
deactivate SVGoogleCalendarAPI
KrmilnikDogodek --> ZMDomačaStran: Vrne dogodke
deactivate KrmilnikDogodek
ZMDomačaStran --> User: Prikaz domače strani z novicami in dogodki
deactivate ZMDomačaStran

@enduml
